text: 🇷🇺 🛸 🇺🇦 Video reportedly shows AI-guided Geran drones flying over Dnepropetrovsk. The drones are reportedly capable of autonomously identifying and engaging targets. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 🇺🇦 据报道，视频显示人工智能引导的“天竺葵”无人机飞越第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克。据报道，这些无人机能够自主识别并攻击目标。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇭🇺 FT: The European Commission is negotiating with Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Péter Magyar, on a workaround to keep part of €10 billion in frozen Covid‑19 recovery funds available beyond an August deadline. The funds were frozen over rule‑of‑law…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 EuroNews : Incoming Hungarian Prime Minister Péter Magyar met European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen in Brussels on Wednesday to unlock billions of euros in suspended EU funding. Budapest faces an August deadline to secure approximately €10 billion frozen under Viktor Orbán due to rule‑of‑law concerns. Magyar, who won a landslide election, is seeking to reset relations with Brussels. European People’s Party leader Manfred Weber said the EU should “help them, not criticise”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇪🇺🇭🇺 金融时报：欧盟委员会正在与匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）进行谈判，寻求一种变通方案，以确保在8月截止日期之后，仍能动用100亿欧元被冻结的Covid-19复苏基金中的一部分。这些资金因法治问题被冻结……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 欧洲新闻台：匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔周三在布鲁塞尔会见了欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩，旨在解冻数十亿欧元的欧盟暂停资金。布达佩斯面临8月的最后期限，以确保获得因维克托·欧尔班的法治问题而被冻结的约100亿欧元资金。在大选中取得压倒性胜利的马扎尔正寻求重置与布鲁塞尔的关系。欧洲人民党领袖曼弗雷德·韦伯表示，欧盟应该“帮助他们，而不是批评他们”。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸🇮🇷 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul reiterated that it was a critique of Tehran's behavior rather than the U.S. Reporter: "Chances are that the term 'humiliate' is not going to go down well there. Do you think it's the right choice of words?"…" ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul stated that NATO is entering a new phase and that NATO countries are stepping up. Reporter: "There have been some difficulties. I think nobody can deny that. Where do we stand at the moment?" Wadephul: "At the moment, I would say the alliance is going into a next phase. Last year, we had a very important NATO summit, where we agreed once again that Article Five matters and that the U.S. is also defending Europe. On the other hand, we are stepping up our efforts to strengthen the European pillar of NATO." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸🇮🇷 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔重申，这是对德黑兰行为的批评，而非针对美国。记者：“‘羞辱’这个词在那里可能不会受欢迎。你认为这是合适的措辞吗？”……” ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔表示，北约正在进入一个新阶段，北约国家正在加强行动。记者：“出现了一些困难。我想没有人能否认这一点。我们目前处于什么位置？”瓦德普尔：“目前，我会说该联盟正在进入下一个阶段。去年，我们举行了一次非常重要的北约峰会，我们再次同意第五条款很重要，美国也在保卫欧洲。另一方面，我们正在加大力度加强北约的欧洲支柱。” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 Приехал старый друг 📝 Путин принимает президента Конго В Москву с государственным визитом прибыл президент Республики Конго Дени Сассу-Нгессо . Ключевое событие визита — переговоры с Владимиром Путиным , которые проходят прямо сейчас. Конголезский лидер уже подчеркнул необходимость ускорения взаимодействия, а российский президент в ответ напомнил о скором подписании плана совместных действий в сфере экономики. ❗️ Самое важное, конечно, сейчас будет обсуждаться за закрытыми дверями . И несмотря на то, что Сассу-Нгессо перечислил большое количество перспективных сфер сотрудничества с Россией, основу разговора явно составят военно-политические вопросы и энергетика . #РеспубликаКонго #Россия 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ： 📝 老朋友来了 📝 普京会见刚果总统 刚果共和国总统德尼·萨苏-恩格索抵达莫斯科进行国事访问。访问的关键事件是与弗拉基米尔·普京的会谈，会谈正在进行中。刚果领导人已经强调了加快互动的重要性，而俄罗斯总统则回应称，双方即将签署经济领域的联合行动计划。 ❗️ 最重要的事情当然现在将在闭门会议中讨论。尽管萨苏-恩格索列举了许多与俄罗斯合作的前景领域，但谈话的基础显然将是军事政治问题和能源。 #刚果共和国 #俄罗斯 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸🇮🇷 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul denied that German Chancellor Friedrich Merz's statements were a criticism of the U.S., instead stating it was a warning to Tehran. Reporter: "I'm glad you brought the chancellor up because he said something…" ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul reiterated that it was a critique of Tehran's behavior rather than the U.S. Reporter: "Chances are that the term 'humiliate' is not going to go down well there. Do you think it's the right choice of words?" Wadephul: "No. It was addressing the behavior of Iran, and it's bad behavior, what Iran is right now doing. And they are, as I said, misunderstanding their position and overplaying their role." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸🇮🇷 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔否认德国总理弗里德里希·默茨的言论是对美国的批评，并表示这是对德黑兰的警告。记者：“我很高兴你提到了总理，因为他说了一些……” ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔重申，这是对德黑兰行为的批评，而非针对美国。记者：“‘羞辱’这个词在那里可能不会受欢迎。你认为这是合适的措辞吗？”瓦德普尔：“不。这是针对伊朗的行为，这是糟糕的行为，伊朗现在所做的一切。正如我所说，他们误解了自己的立场，高估了自己的角色。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul disagreed with the assessment that Germany and the U.S. are going down different paths, adding that they are core allies and partners. Reporter: "You seem to be going down very different paths than the United…" ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul denied that German Chancellor Friedrich Merz's statements were a criticism of the U.S., instead stating it was a warning to Tehran. Reporter: "I'm glad you brought the chancellor up because he said something interesting. I believe it was on Monday. He said that the US was being humiliated by the regime in Tehran at the moment. Is that what he said? You know? Is that going to be a problem for transatlantic relations?" Wadephul: "No. This was a clear warning to Tehran. The US has assembled a lot of military equipment around Iran. We are now in a ceasefire situation, fortunately, but this time has to be used also by Tehran. What we currently see is that Tehran is playing for time and not really negotiating in a way which is necessary and which is needed." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇸 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔不同意德国和美国正在走不同道路的评估，并补充说他们是核心盟友和伙伴。记者：“你们似乎正在走与美国截然不同的道路……” ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔否认德国总理弗里德里希·默茨的言论是对美国的批评，并表示这是对德黑兰的警告。记者：“我很高兴你提到了总理，因为他说了一些有趣的话。我相信是在周一。他说美国目前正受到德黑兰政权的羞辱。他是这么说的吗？你知道吗？这对跨大西洋关系会是个问题吗？”瓦德普尔：“不。这是对德黑兰的明确警告。美国在伊朗周围集结了大量军事装备。幸运的是，我们现在处于停火状态，但这段时间也必须被德黑兰利用。我们目前看到的是，德黑兰在拖延时间，并没有以必要和需要的方式进行真正的谈判。” @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇬 A meeting between Putin and Congolese President Sassou-Nguesso is taking place in the Kremlin. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇬 普京与刚果总统萨苏-恩格索在克里姆林宫举行会晤。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇳 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul stated that the United Nations is under great stress but reiterated that it is the world's most important peace organization. Reporter: "Why even bother being part of the Security Council if, in the world,…" ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul disagreed with the assessment that Germany and the U.S. are going down different paths, adding that they are core allies and partners. Reporter: "You seem to be going down very different paths than the United States. Would you agree with that?" Wadephul: "No, I won't. We are allies. Of course, we have longstanding relations. We as Germans should never forget the role the United States played in allowing us to be reunified before that, freeing us from the Nazi regime. So we are core friends, and we are allies in NATO." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇩🇪🇺🇳 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔（Johann Wadephul）表示，联合国正承受巨大压力，但他重申联合国是世界上最重要的和平组织。记者：“如果在这个世界上……为什么还要费心成为安理会的一员？”” ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇸 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔不同意德国和美国正走在不同道路上的评估，并补充说他们是核心盟友和伙伴。记者：“你似乎正在走与美国截然不同的道路。你同意这一点吗？” 瓦德普尔：“不，我不同意。我们是盟友。当然，我们有着长期的关系。作为德国人，我们永远不应忘记美国在让我们实现统一之前所发挥的作用，即把我们从纳粹政权中解放出来。所以我们是核心朋友，我们是北约的盟友。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇳 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul stated that the United Nations is under great stress but reiterated that it is the world's most important peace organization. Reporter: "Why even bother being part of the Security Council if, in the world, it seems the law of the jungle is more important at the moment than diplomacy?" Wadephul: "I think diplomacy is still very important for this world to prohibit the jungle from winning the race. Of course, we are under stress. The UN system is under stress. The whole international rules-based order is under stress, but we are defending the United Nations system. And there's no greater, no more important peace organization than the UN." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇺🇳 德国外交部长约翰·瓦德普尔表示，联合国正承受巨大压力，但他重申联合国是世界上最重要的和平组织。记者：“如果在这个世界上，丛林法则目前似乎比外交更重要，那么为什么还要费心成为安理会的一员呢？” 瓦德普尔：“我认为外交对于这个世界来说仍然非常重要，以防止丛林法则赢得竞争。当然，我们正承受压力。联合国系统正承受压力。整个基于规则的国际秩序正承受压力，但我们正在捍卫联合国系统。没有比联合国更伟大、更重要的和平组织了。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel LONDON TERROR ATTACK 🔴 🔴 What we know so far: • Stabbing attack today in Golders Green, an area with a large Jewish community. • Suspect described as an Islamic male armed with a kitchen knife. • Terrorist ran along Golders Green Road targeting Jewish pedestrians. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049459670775996715/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伦敦恐怖袭击 🔴 🔴 目前已知情况：• 今天在戈尔德斯格林（Golders Green）发生持刀袭击事件，该地区有大量犹太社区。• 嫌疑人被描述为一名持有菜刀的伊斯兰男性。• 恐怖分子沿着戈尔德斯格林路奔跑，专门针对犹太行人。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049459670775996715/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Slovakia's Supreme Court upholds 21-year sentence, rejecting the appeal against terrorism charges for PM Robert Fico's attacker, Juraj Cintula, who shot and seriously injured the PM in May 2024 — Reuters tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 斯洛伐克最高法院维持21年刑期，驳回了针对总理罗伯特·菲佐（Robert Fico）袭击者尤拉伊·辛图拉（Juraj Cintula）的恐怖主义指控上诉。该袭击者于2024年5月枪击并严重伤害了总理 —— 路透社推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @: JUST IN: Suspected Russian spy arrested in Berlin. The Kazakh national is alleged to have spied for Russia. Among other things, he is accused of passing on information regarding German military aid to Ukraine as well as the arms and defense industry. The suspect is also suspected https://twitter.com/dw_politics/status/2049406203940209060/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @：突发：一名疑似俄罗斯间谍在柏林被捕。据称这名哈萨克斯坦公民为俄罗斯从事间谍活动。除其他事项外，他被指控泄露有关德国对乌克兰军事援助以及武器和国防工业的信息。该嫌疑人还被怀疑 https://twitter.com/dw_politics/status/2049406203940209060/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News NEW: Two Jewish men have been stabbed and seriously wounded in an attack in London -BBC One was stabbed outside a synagogue, and the other was stabbed outside a shop https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2049458346038558926/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 最新消息：两名犹太男子在伦敦的一次袭击中被刺伤并受重伤 - BBC 一人在犹太教堂外被刺伤，另一人在一家商店外被刺伤 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2049458346038558926/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel No new developments in Israel-Lebanon negotiations, Lebanese MTV News reports. Lebanon is conditioning progress on a full Israeli ceasefire and halt to operations. President Joseph Aoun is in contact with the U.S. side to curb the escalation. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据黎巴嫩 MTV 新闻报道，以色列与黎巴嫩的谈判没有新进展。黎巴嫩将进展的条件设定为以色列全面停火并停止行动。总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）正在与美方联系以遏制局势升级。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Michael A. Horowitz RT @: 🚨 Two Jewish Men Stabbed In Golders Green, London, In Suspected Terror Attack; Perp Arrested A man armed with a knife targeted Jewish pedestrians on Golders Green Road in London on Wednesday, leaving two people injured in what authorities are investigating as a possible terror attack. Witnesses reported seeing the suspect running along the busy thoroughfare while attempting to stab passersby. Shomrim responded quickly and were able to detain the individual before police arrived. Officers from the Metropolitan Police then took the suspect into custody after deploying a Taser against the suspect. Emergency responders from Hatzola treated two victims who sustained stab wounds. Their conditions have not yet been disclosed. The incident comes amid a broader pattern of attacks targeting Jewish communities across the United Kingdom, particularly in London. In recent months, there has been a surge in antisemitic incidents, including physical assaults, vandalism, and arson attacks. Just weeks ago, four Hatzola ambulances were destroyed in an arson attack in Golders Green. Police have not released the identity of the suspect, and the motive remains under investigation. Officials have not yet formally classified the incident, though early indications suggest it may be being treated as a suspected terror attack. Authorities are expected to provide further updates as the investigation continues. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @：🚨 两名犹太男子在伦敦戈尔德斯格林被刺伤，疑似恐怖袭击；行凶者被捕。周三，一名持刀男子在伦敦戈尔德斯格林路针对犹太行人行凶，造成两人受伤，当局正将其作为可能的恐怖袭击进行调查。目击者报告称，看到嫌疑人在繁忙的街道上奔跑，同时试图刺伤路人。Shomrim（犹太社区巡逻队）迅速做出反应，并在警察到达前成功拘留了该个人。伦敦警察厅的警官在对嫌疑人使用泰瑟枪后将其拘留。来自 Hatzola（紧急医疗服务）的急救人员对两名受刺伤的受害者进行了治疗。他们的状况尚未披露。此次事件发生在一系列针对英国各地犹太社区的袭击背景下，特别是在伦敦。近几个月来，反犹太事件激增，包括人身攻击、破坏公物和纵火袭击。就在几周前，四辆 Hatzola 救护车在戈尔德斯格林的一起纵火袭击中被毁。警方尚未公布嫌疑人的身份，动机仍在调查中。官员们尚未正式将此事件定性，但早期迹象表明它可能被视为疑似恐怖袭击。预计当局将在调查继续进行时提供进一步更新。推文

text: Open Source Intel Tehran University Professor Mohammad Marandi: U.S. Escalation Would Be Catastrophic for the World; Many of the Missile Launchers, Anti-Aircraft Systems, Helicopters, and Planes That Were Destroyed in the War Were in Fact Sophisticated Chinese-Made Decoys. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049456609579925784/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 德黑兰大学教授穆罕默德·马兰迪（Mohammad Marandi）：美国的升级行动对世界来说将是灾难性的；战争中被摧毁的许多导弹发射器、防空系统、直升机和飞机实际上都是复杂的中国制造的诱饵。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049456609579925784/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Too many bluffs without follow-through have convinced Iran that Trump is all talk and no action. 4 a.m. post on Iran https://twitter.com/JenniferJJacobs/status/2049401527530402057/photo/1 - Jennifer Jacobs tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 太多的虚张声势而没有后续行动，让伊朗确信特朗普只是说说而已，没有实际行动。关于伊朗的凌晨4点帖子 https://twitter.com/JenniferJJacobs/status/2049401527530402057/photo/1 - Jennifer Jacobs 推文

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE: One of the Jewish men stabbed by the Islamist outside the synagogue in London is in now in serious condition. tweet

text: Open Source Intel IDF says troops eliminated a Palestinian operative who crossed the Gaza ceasefire line in southern Gaza today after he approached soldiers "in a manner that posed an immediate threat." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军称，部队今天在加沙南部消灭了一名越过加沙停火线的巴勒斯坦武装人员，此前他“以构成直接威胁的方式”接近士兵。推文

text: Open Source Intel Two launches from Lebanon toward northern Israel. One intercepted, one landed in an open area. IDF says it's another Hezbollah ceasefire violation. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 从黎巴嫩向以色列北部发射了两枚火箭弹。一枚被拦截，一枚落在开阔地带。以色列国防军称这是真主党的又一次停火违规行为。推文

text: Open Source Intel Paramedics performing CPR on one of the stabbing victims at the scene. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049454383348265047/video/1 MORE FOOTAGE: Two ultra-Orthodox Jewish men were stabbed outside a synagogue in London. A suspect is in custody. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049453464820838432/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 医护人员正在现场对其中一名刺伤受害者进行心肺复苏。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049454383348265047/video/1 更多镜头：两名极端正统派犹太男子在伦敦的一座犹太教堂外被刺伤。一名嫌疑人已被拘留。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049453464820838432/video/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🇷🇴 🇩🇪 🇺🇦 Romania’s government has announced its decision to select German-made Lynx infantry fighting vehicles to modernize… tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @StatWatch25：🇷🇴 🇩🇪 🇺🇦 罗马尼亚政府宣布决定选择德国制造的“山猫”（Lynx）步兵战车来现代化…… 推文

text: Open Source Intel MORE FOOTAGE: Two ultra-Orthodox Jewish men were stabbed outside a synagogue in London. A suspect is in custody. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049453464820838432/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 更多镜头：两名极端正统派犹太男子在伦敦的一座犹太教堂外被刺伤。一名嫌疑人已被拘留。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049453464820838432/video/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 "Moderate Opposition" 📝 France is building a discourse along the Syrian model A large-scale offensive by a coalition of Islamists and separatists in Mali has forced the French establishment to urgently seek ways to whitewash the radicals. In the media space of the Fifth Republic, a discussion has started on the theme: "So how do we now build relations with former terrorists?" The publication Le Point decided to play its trump card by interviewing specialized "regional experts." Unlike biased Beninese analysts, French speakers so far show caution and acknowledge: the scenario of "evolution" of the group "Jamaat Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin" (banned in Russia) into something "inclusive" and handshake-worthy is extremely unlikely . 📌 However, the very fact that such questions appear in mainstream media is a troubling marker. Following cautious skeptics, more loyal speakers will inevitably appear who will begin to push the thesis about the "need for dialogue for the sake of stability." And no one is hiding the fact that Islamists will clearly be more pleasant to the leadership of the Élysée Palace than Russians. #Mali #mediatechnologies #France 💀 @rybar_africa — where politics is hotter than the equator 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar in English: 转发自 @ 📝 “温和反对派” 📝 法国正在构建一种叙利亚模式的话语体系。马里伊斯兰主义者和分裂主义者联盟发动的大规模攻势，迫使法国建制派紧急寻找为激进分子洗白的方法。在法兰西第五共和国的媒体空间里，一场关于“我们现在该如何与前恐怖分子建立关系？”的主题讨论已经开始。法国《观点》周刊决定打出王牌，采访了专业的“区域专家”。与那些有偏见的贝宁分析师不同，法国发言人目前表现谨慎并承认：将“伊斯兰和穆斯林支持者组织”（在俄罗斯被禁）“演变”为某种“包容性”且值得握手的对象的设想极不可能实现。 📌 然而，此类问题出现在主流媒体这一事实本身就是一个令人不安的信号。继谨慎的怀疑论者之后，不可避免地会出现更忠诚的发言人，他们将开始推行关于“为了稳定需要对话”的论点。而且没有人掩盖这样一个事实：对于爱丽舍宫的领导层来说，伊斯兰主义者显然会比俄罗斯人更令人愉快。 #马里 #媒体技术 #法国 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们 原消息

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 Two Jewish men have been seriously injured in a stabbing attack in Golders Green, north London. One victim was stabbed outside shops on Golders Green Road, the other outside a synagogue on a side road. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer called the incident “deeply concerning”, saying an investigation is ongoing and the country must be “absolutely clear in our determination to deal with any of these offences”. Police have apprehended a suspect. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 两名犹太男子在伦敦北部戈尔德斯格林（Golders Green）的持刀袭击中受重伤。一名受害者在戈尔德斯格林路（Golders Green Road）的商店外被刺伤，另一名在侧路的一座犹太教堂外被刺伤。英国首相基尔·斯塔默称此事件“令人深感担忧”，并表示调查正在进行中，国家必须“绝对明确我们处理任何此类罪行的决心”。警方已逮捕一名嫌疑人。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇩🇪 Politico: The European Parliament has voted for an EU budget exceeding €2 trillion for the 2028‑2034 period, demanding an extra €200 billion and new EU‑wide taxes on tech giants. Germany and its frugal allies have rejected the proposal, with Chancellor…" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 DW : European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen has called for the EU to raise more of its own revenue through new taxes, warning that without “new own resources” the bloc would face a choice between higher national contributions or lower spending capacity. Speaking to the European Parliament, she backed a package of measures including levies on carbon‑intensive imports, carbon emissions, non‑recycled electronic waste, tobacco and corporate profits, which the Commission says would raise €66 billion per year. The Parliament has additionally called for taxes on online gambling (:<), tech giants and crypto firms. The proposals are part of negotiations for the 2028‑2034 long‑term budget, with Germany and other frugal countries opposing increased spending. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: “⚡️🇪🇺🇩🇪 Politico：欧洲议会投票通过了2028-2034年期间超过2万亿欧元的欧盟预算，要求额外增加2000亿欧元，并对科技巨头征收新的欧盟范围税。德国及其节俭的盟友拒绝了该提议，总理……” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 DW：欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩呼吁欧盟通过新税种筹集更多自有收入，并警告称，如果没有“新的自有资源”，欧盟将面临在提高国家摊款或降低支出能力之间做出选择。在向欧洲议会发表讲话时，她支持一揽子措施，包括对碳密集型进口产品、碳排放、不可回收电子垃圾、烟草和企业利润征税，欧盟委员会称这将每年筹集660亿欧元。议会还呼吁对在线赌博 (:<)、科技巨头和加密货币公司征税。这些提议是2028-2034年长期预算谈判的一部分，德国和其他节俭国家反对增加支出。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇷🇺 Politico : German federal prosecutors have arrested a Kazakh national, identified as Sergej K., on suspicion of spying for a Russian intelligence service. The suspect is accused of transmitting sensitive information about Berlin’s military support for Ukraine and details on German defence companies developing drones and robotics. Authorities also allege he photographed public buildings in Berlin, documented military convoys on German highways, and scouted potential sabotage targets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇷🇺 Politico：德国联邦检察官逮捕了一名哈萨克斯坦籍男子，身份确认为谢尔盖·K（Sergej K.），涉嫌为俄罗斯情报部门从事间谍活动。该嫌疑人被指控传输有关柏林对乌克兰军事支持的敏感信息，以及德国国防公司开发无人机和机器人的详细信息。当局还指控他在柏林拍摄公共建筑，记录德国高速公路上的军事车队，并侦察潜在的破坏目标。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 Russia’s annual 9 May Victory Day parade on Red Square will be held without military equipment for the first time in almost two decades, the defence ministry announced. Citing “the current operational situation”, Moscow said no tanks, artillery or missile systems would roll through the square. An aviation display will still take place, with Su-25 aircraft painting the sky in Russian flag colours. Analysts suggest the scaled‑back parade reflects concerns over Ukrainian long‑range drone strikes on vulnerable military hardware. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国防部宣布，俄罗斯年度5月9日红场胜利日阅兵式将近二十年来首次不展示军事装备。莫斯科援引“当前作战形势”称，没有坦克、火炮或导弹系统会驶过广场。航空表演仍将进行，苏-25飞机将在天空中喷绘出俄罗斯国旗的颜色。分析人士认为，缩减阅兵规模反映了对乌克兰远程无人机袭击脆弱军事装备的担忧。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦🇮🇱🇷🇺Ukrainian Foreign Minister Sybiha says that Israel failed to repond appropriately to Ukraine's request regarding Russian grain vessels delivering goods to Haifa. He reports that the Israeli ambassador to Ukraine has been to summoned to the Ministry…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 Ukrainian Foreign Minister Sybiha announced that Ukraine has submitted through diplomatic and legal channels that action regarding the Panormitis vessel be taken. He alleges that the vessel is carrying grain that was illegally transported from a closed port in occupied Ukrainian territory. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: “⚡️🇺🇦🇮🇱🇷🇺乌克兰外交部长瑟比哈表示，以色列未能就乌克兰关于俄罗斯谷物船只向海法运送货物的问题做出适当回应。他报告称，以色列驻乌克兰大使已被传唤至外交部……” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇱 🇷🇺 乌克兰外交部长瑟比哈宣布，乌克兰已通过外交和法律渠道提交了对“Panormitis”号船只采取行动的请求。他声称该船载有从被占领的乌克兰领土上的封闭港口非法运输的谷物。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 Telegraph : Reform UK leader Nigel Farage has revealed that his home was firebombed in early 2025, with a lit incendiary device pushed through his letterbox. Police investigated but no suspects have been identified. Farage said the attack was an outright arson attempt and that he has faced growing threats, including pints of beer thrown at him and a car attacked while he was inside. He acknowledged that he would never be able to take his personal safety for granted and has received a seven‑figure personal gift (estimated £5 million) from billionaire Christopher Harborne to fund his security. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 Telegraph：英国改革党领袖奈杰尔·法拉奇透露，他的家在2025年初遭到纵火袭击，一个点燃的燃烧装置被从信箱塞入。警方进行了调查，但未确定嫌疑人。法拉奇表示，这次袭击是一次彻头彻尾的纵火企图，他面临着越来越多的威胁，包括有人向他扔啤酒杯，以及他坐在车里时汽车遭到袭击。他承认自己永远无法将个人安全视为理所当然，并已收到亿万富翁克里斯托弗·哈伯恩（Christopher Harborne）提供的七位数个人赠款（估计500万英镑）用于资助他的安保。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 Politico : The European Commission is considering a “zero‑penalty” option that would allow national authorities not to fine energy companies that violate strict methane emissions rules set to take effect next year. The measure, which could last between one and three years, is intended to prevent supply shortages as the Iran war drives energy price spikes. The Commission has ruled out pausing the regulation entirely, but is preparing recommendations for “pragmatic enforcement” ahead of an EU leaders’ summit in June. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 Politico：欧盟委员会正在考虑一种“零处罚”选项，允许国家当局不对违反明年即将生效的严格甲烷排放规则的能源公司进行罚款。该措施可能持续一到三年，旨在防止因伊朗战争导致能源价格飙升而引发的供应短缺。欧盟委员会排除了完全暂停该法规的可能性，但正在为6月份欧盟领导人峰会前准备“务实执法”的建议。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said the war in Iran is costing the EU nearly €500 million a day in higher fossil fuel import costs. “In just 60 days of conflict, our bill for fossil fuel imports has increased by over €27 billion, without a single molecule of additional energy,” she told the European Parliament. She called for accelerating the shift away from imported fossil fuels and faster electrification, and said the Commission will present an Electrification Action Plan by the summer. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩表示，伊朗战争每天给欧盟造成近5亿欧元的化石燃料进口成本增加。她在欧洲议会上说：“在仅仅60天的冲突中，我们的化石燃料进口账单增加了超过270亿欧元，而能源总量却没有增加一分子。”她呼吁加快摆脱进口化石燃料并加快电气化进程，并表示欧盟委员会将在夏季前提出一份电气化行动计划。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇩🇪 Politico : The European Parliament has voted for an EU budget exceeding €2 trillion for the 2028‑2034 period, demanding an extra €200 billion and new EU‑wide taxes on tech giants. Germany and its frugal allies have rejected the proposal, with Chancellor Merz calling the Commission’s €1.8 trillion plan already too large. European Parliament’s president warned that lawmakers will not simply “rubber‑stamp” the budget. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇩🇪 Politico：欧洲议会投票通过了2028-2034年期间超过2万亿欧元的欧盟预算，要求额外增加2000亿欧元，并对科技巨头征收新的欧盟范围税。德国及其节俭的盟友拒绝了该提议，默茨总理称欧盟委员会的1.8万亿欧元计划已经太大了。欧洲议会议长警告称，立法者不会仅仅“盖章”通过预算。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 Reuters : Taiwan is set to top Chinese President Xi Jinping's agenda when U.S. President Donald Trump visits Beijing next month marking a significant shift from their last meeting in South Korea where Xi deliberately set the issue aside. China has been pressing the U.S. at a working level to change its language on Taiwan from "we do not support Taiwan independence" to "we oppose Taiwan independence" — a change Washington has so far declined to make. Taipei is on high alert over whether Trump, known for his transactional approach to alliances, might soften U.S. policy on Taiwan in exchange for Chinese economic concessions. Officials note the strategic stakes extend beyond diplomacy, with Taiwan hosting advanced radar stations and listening posts used by Washington to gather intelligence on China. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 Reuters：台湾问题将成为中国国家主席习近平下个月接待美国总统唐纳德·特朗普访问北京时的首要议程，这标志着与他们上次在韩国会晤时习近平刻意搁置该问题相比，发生了重大转变。中国一直在工作层面敦促美国将其关于台湾的措辞从“我们不支持台湾独立”改为“我们反对台湾独立”——华盛顿迄今为止拒绝做出这一改变。台北对以交易方式处理联盟关系而闻名的特朗普是否可能为了换取中国的经济让步而软化美国对台政策保持高度警惕。官员们指出，战略利害关系超出了外交范畴，台湾拥有华盛顿用于收集中国情报的先进雷达站和监听站。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel PM Netanyahu left his trial this morning for a security consultation at the Kirya over an incoming pro-Palestinian flotilla to Gaza. Around 100 vessels carrying 1,000 activists are currently near Greece and expected off Gaza's coast by the weekend. Defense Minister Katz sanctioned flotilla campaign, which Israel says is organized by Hamas. Israeli security officials say they will not allow the blockade to be broken. In previous flotilla attempts, Shayetet 13 commandos boarded and seized the ships at sea. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡总理今早离开审判现场，前往基里亚（Kirya）进行安全磋商，讨论即将到来的亲巴勒斯坦加沙船队问题。约100艘载有1000名活动人士的船只目前靠近希腊，预计周末抵达加沙海岸。国防部长卡茨批准了船队行动，以色列称该行动由哈马斯组织。以色列安全官员表示，他们不会允许封锁被打破。在之前的船队尝试中，第13突击队（Shayetet 13）在海上登船并扣押了这些船只。推文

text: Open Source Intel Preliminary: Muslim attacker was an immigrant, targeted and stabbed two visibly Jewish men outside their synagogue. He was initially apprehended by the community security watch “Shomerim” BREAKING 🔴 🔴 EXLUSIVE FOOTAGE: Two visibly jewish men stabbed in Golders Green, London. Islamist assailant apprehended. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049444323331035427/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 初步消息：穆斯林袭击者是一名移民，在犹太教堂外针对并刺伤了两名外表明显的犹太男子。他最初被社区安全巡逻队“Shomerim”抓获。突发 🔴 🔴 独家视频：两名外表明显的犹太男子在伦敦戈尔德斯格林被刺伤。伊斯兰主义袭击者已被抓获。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049444323331035427/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ahmad Kaveibi, member of Iran's Supreme Council of Experts: "It is forbidden to hold any negotiation on the right to enrich uranium. This issue falls outside the negotiation's framework. This contradicts the position of the Supreme Leader and is forbidden from a jurisprudential standpoint." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗专家会议成员艾哈迈德·卡维比（Ahmad Kaveibi）：“禁止就铀浓缩权利进行任何谈判。这个问题超出了谈判框架。这与最高领袖的立场相矛盾，从法理角度来看是被禁止的。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Images live from scene: Islamic terrorist used kitchen knife for attack that targeted two Jewish men. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049445433991200817/photo/1 BREAKING 🔴 🔴 EXLUSIVE FOOTAGE: Two visibly jewish men stabbed in Golders Green, London. Islamist assailant apprehended. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049444323331035427/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 现场实时图像：伊斯兰恐怖分子使用厨房刀具对两名犹太男子进行了袭击。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049445433991200817/photo/1 突发 🔴 🔴 独家视频：两名外表明显的犹太男子在伦敦戈尔德斯格林被刺伤。伊斯兰主义袭击者已被抓获。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049444323331035427/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters : Two months into the war, Iran no longer has a single, undisputed clerical arbiter at the pinnacle of power. Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, severely injured in the opening strike that killed his father, remains at the apex but his role is largely to legitimise decisions made by his generals rather than issue directives. Real power has moved to a unified wartime leadership centred on the Supreme National Security Council and dominated by the IRGC, which now drives both military strategy and key political decisions. This shift marks a decisive reordering from clerical primacy to security dominance. Neither side wants to bend: Iran’s IRGC is wary of appearing weak, while U.S. President Trump faces midterm election pressure. The obstacle to a deal is not internal infighting but the gap between what Washington offers and what the Guards are willing to accept. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters：战争进行了两个月，伊朗在权力巅峰已不再拥有单一、无可争议的教权仲裁者。伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）在杀害其父亲的开战打击中受重伤，虽然仍处于最高位置，但他的角色主要是使将军们做出的决定合法化，而不是发布指令。真正的权力已转移到以最高国家安全委员会为中心的统一战时领导层，并由伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）主导，该卫队现在推动军事战略和关键政治决策。这一转变标志着从教权至上到安全主导的决定性重组。双方都不愿屈服：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队担心显得软弱，而美国总统特朗普则面临中期选举压力。达成协议的障碍不是内部斗争，而是华盛顿提供的条件与卫队愿意接受的条件之间的差距。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s currency has hit a new record low, crashing to ~1.8 million rials per $1 on the open market.
text_zh: 伊朗货币汇率跌至历史新低，在公开市场上暴跌至约180万里亚尔兑1美元。

text: Mali: Tuareg rebel spokesman Mohamed Ramadane says Mali’s junta is on the brink amid a major offensive: “The regime will fall.” Rebels (FLA + JNIM) launched coordinated attacks across Mali, including Kidal, Gao, and near Bamako. Kidal was captured, with army/Russian forces withdrawing. JNIM was described as “partners” / “cousins” in the fight. Source: AFP
text_zh: 马里：图阿雷格叛军发言人穆罕默德·拉马丹表示，在一次重大攻势下，马里军政府已处于崩溃边缘：“政权将会倒台。”叛军（FLA + JNIM）在马里各地发动了协同袭击，包括基达尔、加奥以及巴马科附近。基达尔已被占领，军队/俄罗斯部队撤离。JNIM被描述为战斗中的“伙伴”/“表亲”。来源：法新社

text: Israel’s war cost has reached about NIS 405 billion (~$137 billion) since Oct. 7, according to Bank of Israel Governor Amir Yaron, putting heavy strain on the economy. Debt jumped from ~60% to ~70% of GDP, wiping out years of fiscal gains. Defense spending surged +130% to NIS 143B (8.8% of GDP). Officials warn of a “trauma economy” if trends continue. Risk: debt could climb toward ~80% of GDP.
text_zh: 据以色列银行行长阿米尔·亚隆称，自10月7日以来，以色列的战争成本已达到约4050亿新谢克尔（约1370亿美元），给经济造成了沉重负担。债务占GDP的比例从约60%跃升至约70%，抹去了多年的财政收益。国防支出激增130%，达到1430亿新谢克尔（占GDP的8.8%）。官员们警告称，如果这种趋势持续下去，将出现“创伤经济”。风险：债务可能攀升至GDP的约80%。

text: NEW: Armed attackers opened fire on a police patrol in Zahedan, Iran this morning. Two officers — First Sergeant Mohammadreza Nezamdoost and First Lieutenant Ali Momeni — were killed, and two others were wounded.
text_zh: 快讯：今天早上，武装袭击者在伊朗扎黑丹向一支警察巡逻队开火。两名警官——一级中士穆罕默德礼萨·内扎姆杜斯特和中尉阿里·莫梅尼——被杀，另有两人受伤。

text: Ukraine's Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: Ukraine has officially addressed Israel through diplomatic and legal channels, requesting action on the “PANORMITIS” vessel. The Prosecutor General’s Office of Ukraine has submitted a relevant request to the Israeli authorities based on a Ukrainian court ruling to arrest the vessel as part of the ongoing investigation. The vessel is suspected of carrying a grain cargo that was illegally transported from a closed port in the temporarily occupied territory of Ukraine in violation of international law and Ukrainian legislation. This is not Twitter diplomacy, but a very concrete legal and diplomatic request for international legal assistance that necessitates a response. We expect the Israeli side to take it seriously rather than responding with emotional statements.
text_zh: 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比哈：乌克兰已通过外交和法律渠道正式向以色列提出交涉，要求对“PANORMITIS”号船只采取行动。乌克兰总检察长办公室根据乌克兰法院的裁决，已向以色列当局提交了相关请求，要求在正在进行的调查中扣押该船。该船涉嫌运载从乌克兰临时占领区封闭港口非法运输的谷物货物，违反了国际法和乌克兰法律。这不是推特外交，而是一个非常具体的法律和外交援助请求，需要得到回应。我们期望以色列方面认真对待，而不是以情绪化的声明来回应。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif described the twenty-one hour long negotiation session between the U.S.and Iran on April 11th as a marathon session. He reiterated that Pakistan made full efforts to help establish peace in the region, with Field Marshal Asim Munir, Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar and other senior figures playing key roles. Officials said those efforts helped secure an extension of the ceasefire, which they said remains in effect. He added that before Araghchi travelled to Russia, Pakistani officials spoke with him by phone and said he expressed sincere intent regarding his meetings in Oman and indicated that, after consultations with Iran’s leadership, a positive response could come soon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫将4月11日美国和伊朗之间长达21小时的谈判会议描述为一场马拉松式的会议。他重申，巴基斯坦为帮助建立地区和平做出了全力努力，陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔、外交部长伊沙克·达尔和其他高级人物发挥了关键作用。官员们表示，这些努力有助于确保停火协议的延长，他们称该协议仍然有效。他补充说，在阿拉格齐前往俄罗斯之前，巴基斯坦官员曾与他通电话，他说阿拉格齐表达了对阿曼会议的真诚意图，并表示在与伊朗领导层磋商后，很快可能会有积极的回应。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 Al Jadeed information: Former Palestinian ambassador Ashraf Dabour was detained at Beirut airport based on the lawsuit filed against him on corruption charges. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 Al Jadeed消息：前巴勒斯坦大使阿什拉夫·达布尔因针对他的腐败指控诉讼在贝鲁特机场被拘留。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 🔴 EXLUSIVE FOOTAGE: Two visibly jewish men stabbed in Golders Green, London. Islamist assailant apprehended. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049444323331035427/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报突发 🔴 🔴 独家镜头：两名外表明显的犹太男子在伦敦戈尔德斯格林被刺伤。伊斯兰主义袭击者已被逮捕。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049444323331035427/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel North Korea's nuclear arsenal is approaching the threshold needed to overwhelm U.S. missile defenses. The U.S. has 44 ground-based interceptors capable of handling roughly 20–25 incoming missiles. North Korea is producing 12–15 warheads per year and fielding multiple ICBM types with solid-fuel engines and decoy capabilities. - Bloomberg. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 朝鲜的核武库正接近足以压倒美国导弹防御系统的临界点。美国拥有44枚陆基拦截导弹，能够处理大约20-25枚来袭导弹。朝鲜每年生产12-15枚弹头，并部署了多种带有固体燃料发动机和诱饵能力的洲际弹道导弹。 - 彭博社。推文
